rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
Component type contracts should reference ports through valid variables or outputs, not subcomponent ports directly.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes.
Use only identifiers and types explicitly defined in the AADL model.
Avoid encoding AADL properties (e.g., timing, units) as AGREE expressions unless typed ports are available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees must be scoped to component types; bindings to implementations.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
Do not assume AADL property names are automatically available as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
